skills.name: devops
skills.description: Primary skill graph: PR review, SonarQube triage, CI/CD monitoring, incident response, and runbooks. Entry point for all DevOps work.

skills.name: gh-pr-review
skills.description: End-to-end GitHub PR review: gh pr checkout into disposable worktrees, run repo lint/test/build locally, post line-level comments + one-click suggestion blocks via the Reviews API.

skills.name: github
skills.description: Generic gh CLI cheat-sheet: repos, issues, PRs, releases, workflows, and gh api shortcuts. Use for everything that isn't PR-review-specific.

skills.name: gh-issues
skills.description: Auto-triage and auto-fix flows for GitHub Issues: labels, assignees, milestones, and linking PRs.

skills.name: slack
skills.description: Send notifications, summaries, and incident updates to Slack channels and DMs via the bot token.

skills.name: healthcheck
skills.description: Probe HTTP/TCP endpoints, synthesize uptime summaries, and emit alerts when SLOs are breached.

skills.name: tmux
skills.description: Drive tmux sessions/windows/panes for long-running runbooks, log tails, and multi-step ops scripts.

skills.name: xurl
skills.description: Composable HTTP client skill: structured requests, response parsing, and safe retry patterns for DevOps APIs.

skills.name: mastering-aws-cli
skills.description: AWS CLI v2 quick-reference: compute, storage, networking, IAM, SSO, assume-role, cross-account, and GitHub Actions OIDC.

skills.name: summarize
skills.description: General-purpose text summarizer — distill PR diffs, logs, SonarQube reports, or incident timelines.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: Meta-skill: scaffold a new OpsIntelligence skill (SKILL.md, wikilinks, tools, scripts) following the in-repo conventions.
